quit.app.activities.bodyscan.complete_de: You've successfully checked in with your body. Continue focusing on these healing sensations.
quit.app.activities.complete_well_done: Well done! This activity is complete.
quit.app.activities.journal.placeholder: How are you feeling right now? What's on your mind?
quit.app.activities.quiz.good: Great knowledge! Review the ones you missed.
quit.app.activities.quiz.learn: Good effort — learning is part of recovery.
quit.app.activities.quiz.perfect: Perfect! You really know your stuff.
quit.app.activities.tap.success_desc: You tapped {{count}} times. The craving lost. You won.
quit.app.dsm.disclaimer: This assessment is for informational purposes and does not replace a clinical diagnosis by a healthcare professional.
quit.app.dsm.mild_desc: Shows signs of mild dependency. Early intervention is highly effective.
quit.app.dsm.moderate_desc: Moderate dependency detected. Professional support is recommended.
quit.app.dsm.none_desc: No significant indicators of Substance Use Disorder.
quit.app.dsm.q0: Have you used {{substance}} more often or in larger amounts than intended?
quit.app.dsm.q1: Have you wanted to cut down or stop using {{substance}} but couldn't?
quit.app.dsm.q10: Have you experienced withdrawal symptoms when stopping {{substance}}?
quit.app.dsm.q2: Have you spent significant time obtaining, using, or recovering from {{substance}}?
quit.app.dsm.q3: Have you experienced cravings or a strong desire to use {{substance}}?
quit.app.dsm.q4: Has your use resulted in failure to fulfill obligations at work, school, or home?
quit.app.dsm.q5: Have you continued using {{substance}} despite relationship problems?
quit.app.dsm.q6: Have you given up important activities because of {{substance}}?
quit.app.dsm.q7: Have you used {{substance}} in physically hazardous situations?
quit.app.dsm.q8: Have you continued using {{substance}} despite knowing it caused problems?
quit.app.dsm.q9: Have you experienced tolerance — needing more {{substance}}?
quit.app.dsm.severe_desc: Severe dependency detected. Please consult a specialist immediately.
quit.app.privacy_footer: All data stays on your device. Nothing is ever shared.
quit.app.question: Question
quit.app.reset_confirm_message: This will clear your current streak and all logged entries for this substance. This action cannot be undone.
quit.app.status.your_doctor_must_approve: Your doctor must approve all taper changes
quit.app.tagline: Track your recovery journey with clarity and compassion.
quit.app.title: Quit App
